cards.back: An algorithm that tries all possible solutions to a problem

cards.front: What is the Travelling Salesman Problem
cards.back: A classic problem in combinatorial optimization that involves finding the shortest possible route that visits a set of cities and returns to the starting city

cards.front: What is the time complexity of Exhaustive Search
cards.back: O(n!) where n is the number of cities in the Travelling Salesman Problem

cards.front: What is the space complexity of Exhaustive Search
cards.back: O(n!) where n is the number of cities in the Travelling Salesman Problem

cards.front: What is the definition of Brute Force Approach
cards.back: A problem-solving strategy that involves systematically trying all possible solutions to find the optimal or correct solution
